title: Ubiquiti UniFi switch USW-Pro-Max-24-PoE
category: Ubiquiti / LAN networks / Switches / PoE Switches
description: Ubiquiti USW-Pro-Max-24-PoE is a 24-port L3 PoE switch with 8x 2.5Gb POE++ ports and 16x 1Gb ports, where 8 ports are POE++ and 8 ports POE+. Total PoE availability is 400W .Switch provide 2x SFP+ ports and is ready for DC power backup with Ubiquiti UniFi SmartPower Redundant Power System (USP-RPS) 8x 2.5 GbE PoE++ ports 16x GbE ports including 8x PoE+ and 8x PoE++ 2x 10G SFP+ ports 400W total PoE availability DC power backup ready Switch Power cord Rackmount ears 19"
specsSearch: Connectors and Interfaces LAN speed (8) 100/1000/2500Mbps + (16) 10/100/1000Mbps Optical interfaces (2) 10Gbps Other features Touchscreen Power Power type Mains power (230V) PoE type PoE-Out (only) PoE-Out standards 802.3af, 802.3at, 802.3bt Redundant power supply Yes PoE Out ports 24 PoE budget [W] 400 Physical characteristics Design Rackmount Chassis design Metal Buttons Reset Operating temperature [°C] 5 up to 40 Width [mm] 443 Height [mm] 44 Depth [mm] 325 General Switchning capacity [Gbps] 56
